'''Slith Skael''' was a [[Sluissi]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]], who served as a chief communications technician of the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] and assistant to [[Reija Momen]]. He was devoted to his superiors, but when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] invaded the planet, he along with Rejia and the defenders were killed.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The novel ''[[Jedi Trial]]'' incorrectly portrays the [[Sluissi]] as allies of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], when in reality they were [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. One of the most notable foul-ups in this case was placing Slith Skael as one of the heroic hostages of [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]], as well as mentioning several times that it was possible that they would receive reinforcements from [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
